backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the guestbook backend with user profile management, guestbook entry CRUD operations, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: updating the app title to 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' across all components, and redesigning the VTH avatar/logo with hiking-themed branding.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base styles defining OKLCH color tokens for light and dark modes covering background, foreground, card, primary, destructive, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the updated page title 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker', VTH favicon, and Leaflet CSS/JS loaded via CDN.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for feed, add entry, entry detail, world map, and AT map pages, wrapped in QueryClientProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutDialog.tsx: Modal dialog describing the VTH Guest Book project, prominently displaying the VTH avatar image and updated title 'About VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' with community and Internet Computer context.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout component rendering a sticky header with the VTH avatar badge, 'VTH Guest Book' wordmark, 'Vicarious Thru-Hiker' subtitle, hamburger menu, conditional logout button, and a fixed bottom navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/CreateAccountDia: A dialog component that explains Internet Identity and the decentralized nature of the app, allowing users to log in or create an account via the useInternetIdentity hook.
A dialog form for editing an existing guestbook entry, pre-populating fields from the entry and submitting updates via the useUpdateEntry mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: A hamburger menu component that toggles a dropdown with links to open the About, Create Account, and How To Use dialogs.
frontend/src/components/HowToUseDialog.t: A dialog that provides step-by-step instructions for using the VTH Guest Book app, covering signing entries, pinning locations, exploring maps, and browsing the feed.
frontend/src/components/MapLegend.tsx: A small card component that displays a legend hint instructing users to tap a map pin to view the associated entry.
frontend/src/components/MapPin.tsx: A button component rendering an SVG map pin marker that visually changes color and scale when selected.
frontend/src/components/PlaceSearchField: A search input component that queries a geocoding API for place names and lets the user select a result, calling an onSelect callback with the chosen GeocodingResult.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating guestbook data (entries, user profile, admin status) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines a warm earthy OKLCH color palette with light/dark mode CSS variables, and adds custom scrollbar and touch-friendly styles.
frontend/src/lib/geocoding.ts: Utility module that queries the OpenStreetMap Nominatim API to search for places by name and returns normalized results with display name and coordinates.
frontend/src/lib/guestbookFormat.ts: Formatting helpers for guestbook data, including truncating principal IDs, converting nanosecond timestamps to readable dates, formatting coordinates, and encoding/decoding place name tags embedded in comment strings.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddEntryPage.tsx: Page component with a form for authenticated users to submit a new guestbook entry, supporting optional name, trail name, comment, GPS or searched current location, and a favorite place search field.
frontend/src/pages/ATMapPage.tsx: Page component that renders an interactive Leaflet map displaying markers for guestbook entries' favorite places along the Appalachian Trail, with popups showing author name and place name.
frontend/src/pages/EntryDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single guestbook entry's full details (author, trail, comment, location) fetched by timestamp URL param, with edit and delete controls visible to the entry owner or admin.
frontend/src/pages/GuestbookFeedPage.tsx: Shows a reverse-chronological list of all guestbook entries with preview text, inline edit/delete actions for owners and admins, and a button to navigate to the add-entry page.
frontend/src/pages/WorldMapPage.tsx: Renders an interactive Leaflet map (loaded via CDN) with custom SVG pin markers for all entries that have location data, showing author and comment popups.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions to read URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persist them to sessionStorage, and remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (including logo-specific tokens), extended border radii, font families, box shadows, and accordion/fade-in animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state (version 13) for the 'VTH Guest Book: Vicarious Thru-Hiker' app, listing existing features, pending feature requests (title update and avatar redesign), and architectural notes.
